# `Loop`

**Systems:** X16,C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, VIC20, PET,  NES, OK64, ATARI2600, APPLEII, SNES, ORIC, BBCM, ACORN, ATARI800, Amiga, ATARI520ST, PX86, Z80, Z180, M6809  
**Parameters:** `—`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>Loop();</h3>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Performs an infinite loop (and halts the system). </p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
Loop();
// same as
asm(" jmp * ");
</code>


</div>
